title: 「So much so that」句型
titleZh: 「So much so that」表示程度強烈及帶出明顯結果
titleEn: Using So much so that for an extreme degree and clear result

source.file: Sentence Structure 113 -「So much so that」表示程度強烈及帶出明顯結果.pdf

formula: Complete clause 1, so much so that + complete result/evidence clause 2

formulas.formula: Complete clause 1, so much so that + complete result/evidence clause 2

example: He loved the city, so much so that he moved there.
exampleZh: 他非常喜愛這個城市，喜愛到甚至搬到那裏居住。

examples.en: He loved the city, so much so that he moved there.
examples.zh: 他非常喜愛這個城市，喜愛到甚至搬到那裏居住。
examples.highlight: so much so that he moved there

meaning.zh: 第一個分句表達情況、感受或行動的程度非常強烈；第二個分句帶出明顯結果或具體證據。

rules.zh: So much so that 回指前面的整個完整意思，不直接修飾單一形容詞或名詞。
rules.en: So much so that refers back to the whole preceding clause rather than directly modifying one adjective or noun.
examples: She trusted him, so much so that she gave him the only key.

rules.zh: 第二個分句必須顯示第一個情況的程度有多強，成為該強烈程度的結果或證明。
rules.en: The second clause should show how serious, strong or extreme the first idea was.
examples: The road was icy, so much so that several cars could not move.

rules.zh: 兩個意思合併成一句時，通常在 so much so that 前使用逗號。
rules.en: Use a comma before so much so that when the two ideas appear in one sentence.
examples: The room was quiet, so much so that we could hear the clock ticking.

rules.zh: 前面的分句本身應是完整陳述，that 後面亦必須包括主語和動詞。
rules.en: Clause 1 should already contain a complete statement, and the clause after that must also contain a subject and verb.
examples: The film impressed Daniel, so much so that he watched it again.

rules.zh: So much so that 已表示程度很深，改寫時通常刪去 very、extremely、so、such 和 to such an extent 等重複程度字眼。
rules.en: Words such as very, extremely, so, such and to such an extent are normally removed because so much so that already expresses extreme degree.
examples: The room was quiet, so much so that we could hear the clock.

rules.zh: Such...that 直接修飾名詞詞組；so much so that 則先完成整個陳述，再加入結果或證明。
rules.en: Such...that directly describes a noun phrase; so much so that refers back to a completed clause and adds a striking result or proof.
examples: It was such a difficult question that nobody could answer it.
The question was difficult, so much so that nobody could answer it.

rules.zh: Such that 通常直接連接 structured、designed、influence 或 effect 等詞，表示安排方式或影響結果，而不是回指獨立完成分句。
rules.en: Such that is normally grammatically connected to words such as structured, designed, influence or effect rather than commenting on a separate completed clause.
examples: We structured the schedule such that everyone gets a lunch break.

rules.zh: So that 說明預期目的；so much so that 提出實際結果或證據，而不是目標。
rules.en: So that explains an intended purpose; so much so that presents a result or evidence, not an intended goal.
examples: I studied hard so that I could pass.
I studied hard, so much so that I forgot to eat.

rules.zh: So + adjective/adverb + that 直接加強形容詞或副詞；so much so that 回指整個分句，再補充結果。
rules.en: So + adjective/adverb + that directly intensifies an adjective or adverb; so much so that refers back to the whole clause and then adds a result.
examples: Dad was so angry that he broke his phone.
Dad was angry, so much so that he broke his phone.

benefits.zh: 能有力地強調第一個情況並非一般程度，而是足以帶來明顯結果。
benefits.en: This structure tells the listener that the first situation was strong enough to cause a surprising or noticeable result.

benefits.zh: 不只說感受很強烈，還能加入具體行動，作為程度的清楚證明。
benefits.en: Instead of simply stating a strong feeling, you can add an action that proves how strong it was.

benefits.zh: 可以把情況及其結果清楚合併，不需要寫成兩句分散短句。
benefits.en: Instead of writing two separate sentences, you can connect the situation and its result clearly.

benefits.zh: 在說話或寫作時，可先提出概括說法，再加入明顯例子或後果，使解釋更完整。
benefits.en: In speaking and writing, you can first make a general statement and then add a strong example or consequence.

benefits.zh: 它提供 so + adjective + that 以外的另一種程度和結果句式，增加變化。
benefits.en: This structure gives you another way to express degree and result instead of repeatedly using so + adjective + that.

en: Rewrite each sentence using so much so that to show that the first idea was true to an extreme degree and led to the second result.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 so much so that 改寫以下句子，表示第一個情況的程度非常強烈，並帶來第二個明顯結果。
答案必須寫成一個完整句子。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: He loved the city so much that he moved there.
questions.promptZh: 他非常喜愛這個城市，甚至搬到那裏居住。
questions.answer: He loved the city, so much so that he moved there.
questions.answerZh: 他非常喜愛這個城市，喜愛到甚至搬到那裏居住。
questions.highlight: He loved the city, so much so that he moved there.

questions.promptZh: 馬庫斯改善英語的決心非常堅定，甚至錄下並重溫每次練習對話。

questions.prompt: The public response to the charity appeal was so generous that the organisers reached their monthly target in one day.
questions.promptZh: 公眾對慈善募捐的反應非常慷慨，主辦單位一天內便達到整月目標。
questions.answer: The public response to the charity appeal was generous, so much so that the organisers reached their monthly target in one day.
questions.answerZh: 公眾對慈善募捐的反應非常慷慨，慷慨到主辦單位一天內便達到整月目標。
questions.highlight: The public response to the charity appeal was generous, so much so that the organisers reached their monthly target in one day.

questions.prompt: The train delays became so serious that some commuters began working from home twice a week.
questions.promptZh: 列車延誤變得非常嚴重，一些通勤人士開始每星期在家工作兩天。
questions.answer: The train delays became serious, so much so that some commuters began working from home twice a week.
questions.answerZh: 列車延誤變得非常嚴重，嚴重得一些通勤人士開始每星期在家工作兩天。
questions.highlight: The train delays became serious, so much so that some commuters began working from home twice a week.

questions.prompt: Elena believed strongly in the local project. She invested most of her savings in it.
questions.promptZh: 埃琳娜非常相信這個本地項目。她把大部分積蓄投資其中。

questions.prompt: Why did every department need extra training? The new safety rule was a major change.
questions.promptZh: 為甚麼每個部門都需要額外培訓？新的安全規則是一項重大改變。
questions.answer: The new safety rule was a major change, so much so that every department needed extra training.
questions.answerZh: 新的安全規則是一項重大改變，甚至令每個部門都需要額外培訓。
questions.highlight: The new safety rule was a major change, so much so that every department needed extra training.

questions.prompt: Air quality in the town improved to such an extent that residents began opening their windows again.
questions.promptZh: 鎮內的空氣質素大幅改善，居民開始再次打開窗戶。
questions.answer: Air quality in the town improved, so much so that residents began opening their windows again.

questions.prompt: The mistake affected customer trust so severely that the company apologised publicly and offered refunds.
questions.promptZh: 這個錯誤嚴重影響顧客信任，公司公開道歉並提供退款。

questions.prompt: Several audience members were so moved by the final scene that they stayed silent after the lights came on.
questions.promptZh: 幾名觀眾深受最後一幕感動，燈亮後仍保持沉默。

questions.prompt: The research findings challenged the team’s original plan to such a degree that they redesigned the entire project before continuing.
questions.promptZh: 研究結果大大挑戰了團隊原來的計劃，他們在繼續之前重新設計整個項目。
